revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Republic of China/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Republic of China/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23367905411|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Republic_of_China%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Redirect|Template:Country data ROC|the flag of the Russian Olympic Committee|Template:Country data Russia#Flag variants}} * {{Flag icon|Russia|roc-olympics}} → {{Flag icon|Russia|roc-olympics}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Country data templates of partly recognized states|China]] [[Category:Country data templates of China| Republic]] [[Category:Country data templates of Taiwan| Republic]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24919637890|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Redirect|Template:Country data ROC|the flag of the Russian Olympic Committee|Template:Country data Russia#Flag variants}} * {{Flag icon|Russia|roc-olympics}} → {{Flag icon|Russia|roc-olympics}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Country data templates of partly recognized states|China]] [[Category:Country data templates of China| Republic]] [[Category:Country data templates of Taiwan| Republic]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
